# Salestools Club

> A curated directory of sales APIs, SDKs, and MCP servers for AI agents and developers.

## Description
Salestools Club provides the technical "lego blocks" needed to automate GTM (Go-To-Market) workflows. We focus on tools that are "Agent Ready" – meaning they have clean REST APIs, robust SDKs, or native Model Context Protocol (MCP) support.

## Key Categories
- **Prospecting**: Find and enrich contact data (e.g., Apollo, ZoomInfo, Clay).
- **Email Outreach**: Programmatic email sending and tracking (e.g., SendGrid, Mailgun).
- **CRM**: Systems of record for sales data (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive).
- **Workflow Automation**: Connect tools via APIs or MCP (e.g., Zapier, Make).
- **Conversation Intelligence**: Analyze sales calls and meetings (e.g., Gong, Chorus).

## For AI Agents
- **MCP Servers**: Native support for Claude Desktop and Cursor.
- **Starter Prompts**: Pre-configured prompts to get started with any tool.
- **Agentic Integration**: Tools designed for programmatic use by LLMs.

## Directory Structure
- [All APIs](https://salestools.club/api)
- [MCP Servers](https://salestools.club/mcp)
- [Categories](https://salestools.club/categories)
- [About](https://salestools.club/about)
